datasetId.title: Dataset ID
datasetId.description: The Apify dataset ID from Actor 1 containing articles and events.

topStoriesCount.title: Top Stories Count
topStoriesCount.description: Number of top stories to feature in the newsletter. Extras beyond what you publish serve as ready-made backups.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Optional webhook URL to POST the newsletter draft on completion.

forceFresh.title: Force Fresh Run
forceFresh.description: Ignore any saved checkpoint and refetch the input dataset.
